title: Positive Flow: Complete Onboarding Process
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the onboarding screen. | Click on the 'Receive Bitcoin' section. | Click on the 'Receive' button. | Wait for the onboarding process to complete. | Verify that the user is on the second step of the onboarding process.
expected_result: The user is on the second step of the onboarding process.

title: Negative Flow: Skip All
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the onboarding screen. | Click on the 'Skip All' button.
expected_result: The onboarding process is skipped, and the user is directed to the main wallet screen.

title: Boundary/Validation: Invalid Input
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the onboarding screen. | Click on the 'Receive Bitcoin' section. | Click on the 'Receive' button. | Enter an invalid wallet address in the input field.
expected_result: An error message is displayed indicating that the wallet address is invalid.

title: UI Test: Header Navigation
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the onboarding screen. | Click on the menu icon in the header. | Click on the QR code icon in the header.
expected_result: The menu and QR code icons are functional and navigate to the expected screens.

title: Usability Test: Progress Indicator
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the onboarding screen. | Verify the progress indicator shows the user is on the first of three steps.
expected_result: The progress indicator correctly shows the user is on the first of three steps.

title: Accessibility Test: Skip All Button
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the onboarding screen. | Verify the 'Skip All' button is accessible and can be clicked.
expected_result: The 'Skip All' button is accessible and can be clicked.

title: Usability Test: Navigation
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the onboarding screen. | Click on the 'Receive Bitcoin' section. | Click on the 'Receive' button. | Navigate back to the previous screen.
expected_result: The user can navigate back to the previous screen.

title: Data Persistence Test: Transaction Persistence
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the onboarding screen. | Click on the 'Receive Bitcoin' section. | Click on the 'Receive' button. | Wait for the onboarding process to complete. | Exit the app and relaunch it. | Verify that the user is on the second step of the onboarding process.
expected_result: The user is on the second step of the onboarding process.
